_description: Backend admin + auth + beneficiary + commission + dashboard + dealer modules (batch 6/23)

nodes.name: admin.controller.ts
nodes.summary: Admin HTTP handlers: list dealers, suspend dealer, platform stats, bulk notify

nodes.name: admin.routes.ts
nodes.summary: Admin route registration with admin role guard middleware

nodes.name: admin.service.ts
nodes.summary: Admin business logic: dealer listing with filters, suspension, platform analytics, bulk notification insertion

nodes.name: auth.controller.ts
nodes.summary: Auth HTTP handlers: login, logout, token refresh, forgot-password flow, change-password, get-me

nodes.name: auth.routes.ts
nodes.summary: Auth route registration with inline JSON body schemas and authenticate middleware

nodes.name: auth.service.ts
nodes.summary: Auth business logic: credential login, JWT refresh rotation, logout with blacklisting, OTP password reset, change password, dealer profile

nodes.name: beneficiary.controller.ts
nodes.summary: Beneficiary HTTP handlers: list, get, search, create, update, deactivate

nodes.name: beneficiary.routes.ts
nodes.summary: Beneficiary CRUD route registration with authenticate middleware

nodes.name: beneficiary.service.ts
nodes.summary: Beneficiary business logic: list with text search, get by id, create with duplicate check, update with field merge, soft-deactivate

nodes.name: commission.controller.ts
nodes.summary: Commission HTTP handlers: set rates, get rates, calculate, list, settlement history, create settlement, save payments

nodes.name: commission.routes.ts
nodes.summary: Commission route registration with authenticate and admin authorize middleware

nodes.name: commission.service.ts
nodes.summary: Commission business logic: rate upsert, rate lookup, monthly calculation with TDS, paginated list, settlement creation with bank info, payment save

nodes.name: dashboard.controller.ts
nodes.summary: Dashboard HTTP handlers: get summary for dealer

nodes.name: dashboard.routes.ts
nodes.summary: Dashboard route registration with authenticate middleware, includes master dashboard route

nodes.name: dashboard.service.ts
nodes.summary: Dashboard business logic: aggregated dealer summary with Redis caching, today/month metrics, beneficiaries, stock, low stock alerts, monthly sales breakdown

nodes.name: dealer.controller.ts
nodes.summary: Dealer HTTP handlers: register, get, update, stats, sessions, revoke session, FPS ID lookup, heartbeat

nodes.name: AdminService
nodes.summary: AdminService with listDealers, suspendDealer, getPlatformStats, bulkNotify methods

nodes.name: listDealersHandler
nodes.summary: GET /admin/dealers — list dealers with filters

nodes.name: suspendDealerHandler
nodes.summary: PATCH /admin/dealers/:id/suspend — suspend a dealer

nodes.name: getPlatformStatsHandler
nodes.summary: GET /admin/stats — platform-wide statistics

nodes.name: bulkNotifyHandler
nodes.summary: POST /admin/bulk-notify — send bulk notifications to dealers

nodes.name: adminRoutes
nodes.summary: Registers all admin routes on Fastify instance

nodes.name: listDealers
nodes.summary: Query dealers with optional district/taluka/active filters, paginated

nodes.name: suspendDealer
nodes.summary: Set dealer is_active=FALSE, clear Redis online status

nodes.name: getPlatformStats
nodes.summary: Aggregate platform-wide dealer, beneficiary, transaction, district, commodity stats

nodes.name: bulkNotify
nodes.summary: Insert notifications by dealer IDs, district, or broadcast to all active dealers

nodes.name: loginHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/login — authenticate dealer, set cookies

nodes.name: logoutHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/logout — clear cookies, blacklist tokens

nodes.name: refreshHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/refresh — rotate JWT tokens via refresh cookie

nodes.name: forgotPasswordRequestHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/forgot-password/request — send OTP for password reset

nodes.name: forgotPasswordVerifyHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/forgot-password/verify — verify OTP token

nodes.name: forgotPasswordResetHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/forgot-password/reset — reset password with verification token

nodes.name: changePasswordHandler
nodes.summary: POST /auth/change-password — change authenticated dealer password

nodes.name: getMeHandler
nodes.summary: GET /auth/me — get authenticated dealer profile

nodes.name: setAccessCookie
nodes.summary: Internal helper — set httpOnly access_token cookie

nodes.name: setRefreshCookie
nodes.summary: Internal helper — set httpOnly refresh_token cookie

nodes.name: clearAuthCookies
nodes.summary: Internal helper — clear both auth cookies

nodes.name: ACCESS_COOKIE_OPTS
nodes.summary: Access token cookie options: httpOnly, secure in production, 15min maxAge

nodes.name: REFRESH_COOKIE_OPTS
nodes.summary: Refresh token cookie options: httpOnly, secure in production, 30day maxAge

nodes.name: authRoutes
nodes.summary: Registers all auth routes on Fastify instance with inline JSON schemas

nodes.name: AuthService
nodes.summary: AuthService with login, refresh, logout, forgotPasswordRequest/Verify/Reset, changePassword, getMe

nodes.name: hashToken
nodes.summary: Internal helper — SHA-256 hash a token

nodes.summary: GET /beneficiaries — list beneficiaries for dealer

nodes.name: getBeneficiaryHandler
nodes.summary: GET /beneficiaries/:id — get single beneficiary

nodes.name: searchBeneficiariesHandler
nodes.summary: GET /beneficiaries/search — text search beneficiaries

nodes.name: createBeneficiaryHandler
nodes.summary: POST /beneficiaries — create new beneficiary

nodes.name: updateBeneficiaryHandler
nodes.summary: PATCH /beneficiaries/:id — update beneficiary

nodes.name: deleteBeneficiaryHandler
nodes.summary: DELETE /beneficiaries/:id — soft-deactivate beneficiary

nodes.name: beneficiaryRoutes
nodes.summary: Registers all beneficiary CRUD routes with authenticate middleware

nodes.name: BeneficiaryService
nodes.summary: BeneficiaryService with list, getById, search, create, update, deactivate methods

nodes.summary: POST /commission/rates — set commission rate for a commodity

nodes.name: getCommissionRatesHandler
nodes.summary: GET /commission/rates — get current commission rates

nodes.name: calculateCommissionHandler
nodes.summary: GET /commission/calculate — calculate monthly commission for dealer

nodes.name: listCommissionsHandler
nodes.summary: GET /commission — paginated list of commissions

nodes.name: getSettlementHistoryHandler
nodes.summary: GET /commission/settlements — settlement history for dealer

nodes.name: createSettlementHandler
nodes.summary: POST /commission/settle — initiate settlement for pending commissions

nodes.name: savePaymentsHandler
nodes.summary: POST /commission/payments — save payment records for commissions

nodes.name: commissionRoutes
nodes.summary: Registers all commission routes with authenticate and optional admin authorize

nodes.name: CommissionService
nodes.summary: CommissionService with setRate, getRates, calculate, list, getSettlementHistory, createSettlement, savePayments

nodes.name: getDashboardSummaryHandler
nodes.summary: GET /dashboard/summary — aggregated dashboard metrics for dealer

nodes.name: dashboardRoutes
nodes.summary: Registers dashboard routes including summary and master dashboard

nodes.name: DashboardService
nodes.summary: DashboardService with getSummary (cached multi-metric aggregated query)

nodes.name: registerHandler
nodes.summary: Register a new dealer

nodes.name: getDealerHandler
nodes.summary: GET /dealers/:id — get dealer by id

nodes.name: updateDealerHandler
nodes.summary: PATCH /dealers/:id — update dealer details

nodes.name: getStatsHandler
nodes.summary: GET /dealers/:id/stats — dealer performance stats

nodes.summary: GET /dealers/:id/sessions — list active sessions

nodes.summary: DELETE /dealers/:id/sessions/:sessionId — revoke specific session

nodes.summary: GET /dealers/lookup/:fpsId — lookup dealer by FPS ID
